scripts.launch:final: npm run clean:next-conflict && npm run build:guard && npm run db:doctor && npm run prisma:validate && npm run phase17:audit
scripts.prelaunch:full: npm run clean:next-conflict && npm run deps:guard && npm run build:guard && npm run env:audit && npm run prisma:validate && npm run final:audit && npm run route:inventory
scripts.qa:all: npm run prelaunch:full && npm run phase17:audit
scripts.preflight:prod: npm run clean:next-conflict && npm run deps:guard && npm run build:guard && npm run env:audit && npm run prisma:validate && npm run final:audit && npm run route:inventory && npm run phase19:audit
scripts.release:candidate: npm run preflight:prod && npm run typecheck
scripts.release:final-check: npm run clean:next-conflict && npm run deps:guard && npm run build:guard && npm run env:audit && npm run prisma:validate && npm run phase20:audit && npm run typecheck
scripts.doctor:all: npm run db:doctor && npm run final:fixpack
scripts.release:stable: npm run clean:next-conflict && npm run deps:guard && npm run build:guard && npm run env:audit && npm run prisma:validate && npm run route:inventory && npm run phase21:audit && npm run typecheck
scripts.ship:prod: npm run release:stable && npm run build
scripts.postrelease:check: npm run db:doctor && npm run smoke:local
